scripts.make:help: node -e "console.log(['Omni Agent Desktop \u2014 supported make targets:', '  help     Show this help message', '  install  Install dependencies (npm ci)', '  dev      Run the Tauri dev app (npm run tauri dev)', '  build    Build the Tauri app (npm run tauri build)', '  start    Launch the built release app (npm start)', '  test     Run frontend (vitest) and Rust (cargo) tests', '  check    Type-check/build frontend and cargo check', '  clean    Remove build artifacts (dist + cargo clean)'].join('\n'))"
